rulings.Case Title: BARBARA HAMMES et al VS. HAIGHT & FILLMORE ASSOCIATES LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Barbara Hammes' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 7, 2015, line 3. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Discovery. (1)The Motion is denied without prejudice; (2) No sanctions are ordered; and (3) By on or before August 7, 2015, counsel for plaintiff Hammes and defendant Flynn are ordered to and shall conduct a comprehensive meet and confer at least by telephone and preferably in person to reach a mutually acceptable understanding on the production of the documents requested in the Request, taking into account, a) there has probably been considerable duplication in the documents sought by the Request and those sought from, and produced by, defendants Haight Fillmore and Meridian Management, as well as those already produced by defendant Flynn; b) the additional documents produced by defendants in May and June need to be taken into account in the meet and confer discussions; c) there are planned depositions by plaintiff that might assist in identifying and furnishing with greater precision relevant documents to be produced; d) after an agreement as to documents to be produced relevant to the building in question, and, based on need and relevance, there might be considered an agreement for the limited production of documents with respect to other buildings owned by defendant Flynn, if in his possession and not produced by the other defendants; and e) the "relevant period" for the document production for the building by Mr. Flynn as to documents in his possession might more sensibly be limited to no more than the four year period prior to the date of the fire in the building on September 27, 2011; (4) By on or before August 7, 2015 the agreement with respect to document production under the Request shall be reduced to writing; and (5) By on or before August 15, 2015 the agreed on document production by defendant Flynn under the Request shall have occurred prior to plaintiff's planned depositions. = (501/REQ)
